changeSet.author: mcpierce
changeSet.createView: SELECT DISTINCT p.file_hash, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cp.comic_book_id) FROM comic_pages_v4 cp WHERE cp.file_hash = p.file_hash) as comic_count FROM comic_pages_v4 p WHERE p.file_hash IN (SELECT file_hash FROM comic_pages_v4 GROUP BY file_hash HAVING COUNT(*) > 1);
